name: small
description: Small benchmark project: two agents, one question/answer exchange, one park/resume cycle. Establishes the baseline cost of the inbox-first protocol.

agents.name: editor
agents.description: Owns the style guide and editorial calls

steps.explanation: Writer asks editor for a voice ruling before drafting.
steps.subject: Voice ruling for chapter one
steps.body: First or third person for the opening chapter?

steps.explanation: Writer parks until the editor answers, exercising the never-wait-while-running invariant.
steps.resume_hint: Draft chapter one using the ruled voice.

steps.explanation: Tick one wakes editor to answer; tick two wakes writer to resume from the reply.
The park must be resumed after the answer arrives.
A single directed wait can never cycle.
